headline: FirstEnergy Sees Revenue Growth in Q1, Earnings Match Estimates
summary: FE's first-quarter revenues have risen 10.5% to $4.2B, core EPS met estimates and the Energize365 capital plan of $36B for 2026-2030 and full-year guidance are reaffirmed.

raw.headline: FirstEnergy Sees Revenue Growth in Q1, Earnings Match Estimates
raw.summary: FE's first-quarter revenues have risen 10.5% to $4.2B, core EPS met estimates and the Energize365 capital plan of $36B for 2026-2030 and full-year guidance are reaffirmed.

headline: FirstEnergy Doubles Down on Grid Investment After Strong Q1 Results
summary: FirstEnergy beats first quarter earnings estimates and reaffirms its massive five-year capital plan targeting near the top of its 6-8% growth range.
